creator: giffunip@asme.org
text:
Gplot is a utility and library, originally for Cray, for 
converting/displaying files from CGM format.

Fix: 

gplot.tar.gz in incoming.
How-To-Repeat: Only problem is that I couldn't build the Motif tool in X11R6. I also 
don't why I had to apply patch-ab, but it works as I tested converting
the examples to postscript.
